root_cause: Pod is stuck in repeated volume mount retries
evidence: Dominant mount failure message: Unable to attach or mount volumes: unmounted volumes=[data], unattached volumes=[data]: timed out waiting for the condition

causes.message: Pod continues to retry volume mount without success
Pod cannot proceed due to failed volume mount

pod:payments-worker-0: Pod repeatedly fails to mount a PVC-backed volume

likely_causes: PVC or PV issue preventing kubelet from completing the mount
suggested_checks: Inspect kubelet and CSI driver logs on the affected node
